# kSecRevocationPreferCRL

**Global Variable**

Prefer CRL revocation checking over OCSP; by default, OCSP is preferred.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecRevocationPreferCRL: CFOptionFlags { get }
```
title: kSecRevocationPreferCRL
